---
title: "Dajedaje"
author: pino
affiliation: Sapienza
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: ao   
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 200px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 400px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    theme: superhero
    self-contained: true  
---
# Presentation

Daje, dajino, dajone

## Mini dajino

### Micro dajino

#### Nano dajino
